description_long: This nightstand features a sleek, modern design with a square, dark wood tabletop that has a high-gloss finish, reflecting light and objects placed on it. The tabletop is supported by a geometric, open-frame base made of metallic material with a gold or brass finish, giving it a luxurious and contemporary appearance. The legs form a cube-like structure, providing both stability and visual interest. On top of the nightstand, there are two decorative bird figurines, one dark blue and one pale yellow, adding a playful accent. The nightstand does not have any visible drawers, handles, or storage compartments, emphasizing its minimalist aesthetic. Its clean lines and reflective surfaces make it suitable for upscale urban interiors or modern public spaces.
description: A modern nightstand with a glossy dark wood top and a gold metallic open-frame base, featuring two decorative bird figurines. The design is minimalist, with no visible drawers or handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full square tabletop, both bird figurines, and the open gold frame base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the nightstand and the alignment of the bird figurines.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bird figurines and the symmetry of the frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the pale yellow bird and the open frame structure.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
